ddt:Target.Name: BMS12V_V2.0
ddt:Target.Description:
[8] 2020/01/21 Mohamed EL FADILI update of database
[7] 2019/12/24 Nissan XX6 Added some Identification request and more, based on Rev5.
[6] 2019/11/29 Nissan XX6 Modified DM/FFD/Config data, based on Rev4.
[5]2019/10/02 Nissan XX6 Modified Config items $01F0, $01F2, $01F4 and $01F5.
[4] 2019/09/25 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Added Item: Failures.
[3] 2019/08/06 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified CANID.
[2] 2019/06/20 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified Item: DM, WS, AT.
[1] 2018/11/05 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Add item: AT(1 item)
[N] 2018/10/18 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: activate in wake up mode of the BMS only(00h)
Activate in wake up and/or sleep mode of the BMS(80h)
Open the relay when the BMS receive frame crash
Close the relay when the BMS receive frame crash
Pack disconected (internaly or externaly or both)
(TBD) keep the switch in the same state(80h)

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter
